_comment: Source-of-truth catalog of deep settings exposed in the v2 prototype. Generated 2026-05-13 from a domain-research agent. Consumed by data.js (PS_DEEP_SETTINGS) and the various advanced-options panels. Edit here, then re-derive into data.js.

score_functions.label: Score function
score_functions.tooltip: Energy function used to score conformations; ref2015 is the modern default, franklin2019 for membrane proteins, beta_nov16 for cartesian work.

score_functions.label: Weight overrides
score_functions.tooltip: Override individual score terms, e.g. fa_rep:0.55 or coordinate_constraint:1.0.

score_functions.label: Ligand score function
score_functions.tooltip: Separate scorefxn for the ligand-receptor interface; ligand.wts has tuned hbond and electrostatic terms.

relax_protocols.label: Relax protocol
relax_protocols.tooltip: How the structure is energy-minimized; FastRelax is the standard production choice.

relax_protocols.label: Relax cycles
relax_protocols.tooltip: Number of ramp cycles in FastRelax; 5 is standard, 1 is fast preview, 15+ for publication-quality.

relax_protocols.label: Relax ramp script
relax_protocols.tooltip: Built-in repulsive-ramping schedule; MonomerRelax2019 is the current recommended.

relax_protocols.label: Cartesian relax
relax_protocols.tooltip: Relax in xyz space (better geometry, slower) vs torsion space.

relax_protocols.label: Constrain to start coords
relax_protocols.tooltip: Adds harmonic restraints to Cα atoms so the structure doesn't drift during relax.

relax_protocols.label: Coord constraint stdev (Å)
relax_protocols.tooltip: Width of harmonic well restraining atoms to start positions; smaller = stiffer.

relax_protocols.label: Min tolerance
relax_protocols.tooltip: Convergence threshold for the minimizer; smaller = tighter min, longer runtime.

relax_protocols.label: Minimizer type
relax_protocols.tooltip: Numerical minimizer; lbfgs_armijo_nonmonotone is the modern default.

packer.label: Linear memory interaction graph
packer.tooltip: Lower-memory packer for large systems; turn off for highest accuracy on small targets.

packer.label: Soft repulsive packing
packer.tooltip: Use softened Lennard-Jones during packing to let rotamers escape clashes.

packer.label: Rotamer sampling (ex1/ex2)
packer.tooltip: Extra subrotamers around χ1/χ2; more = better packing but quadratic cost.

packer.label: Dunbrack prob cutoff
packer.tooltip: Cumulative probability cutoff for including rotamers from the Dunbrack library.

constraints.label: Constraint types
constraints.tooltip: Geometric restraints during relax/dock; CoordinateConstraint anchors atoms, AtomPair restrains distances.

constraints.label: Constraint weight
constraints.tooltip: Global multiplier on constraint score terms.

pose_prep.label: Idealize bond geometry
pose_prep.tooltip: Snap bond lengths/angles to ideal values before relax; useful for crystal structures with strain.

pose_prep.label: Renumber chains sequentially
pose_prep.tooltip: Renumber residues 1..N per chain so downstream tools agree.

pose_prep.label: Chains to keep
pose_prep.tooltip: Chain IDs to retain; others are stripped before training.

pose_prep.label: Point mutations
pose_prep.tooltip: Mutations to apply, e.g. A123V; uses Rosetta MutateResidue mover.

pose_prep.label: Missing-residue rebuild
pose_prep.tooltip: Strategy to fill gaps; alphafold/esmfold give best loops, loophash is fastest.

alternatives.label: Preparation engine
alternatives.tooltip: Backend that performs energy min and hydrogen addition; OpenMM is faster for big systems, Schrödinger requires a license.

alternatives.label: OpenMM force field
alternatives.tooltip: Force field for OpenMM minimization of the protein.

alternatives.label: Hydrogen placement
alternatives.tooltip: Tool to add and optimize hydrogens; Reduce is the community standard.

alternatives.label: Ligand protonation
alternatives.tooltip: Generates physiologically relevant protonation states for the ligand.

alternatives.label: Target pH
alternatives.tooltip: pH used for ligand protonation enumeration.

alternatives.label: Tautomer enumeration
alternatives.tooltip: Generate alternate tautomers with RDKit/MolVS before featurization.

alternatives.label: Stereoisomer enumeration
alternatives.tooltip: Expand stereocenters; 'undefined_only' fills in unspecified centers without exploding defined ones.

alternatives.label: Conformer generator
alternatives.tooltip: Algorithm for generating 3D conformers; ETKDGv3 is the modern RDKit default.

alternatives.label: Conformers per ligand
alternatives.tooltip: Number of low-energy 3D conformers to retain.

alternatives.label: Ligand FF minimization
alternatives.tooltip: Force field for cleaning up ligand geometry; MMFF94s is the standard.

alternatives.label: Partial charge model
alternatives.tooltip: Charge assignment; AM1-BCC is the docking/MD standard, Gasteiger is fastest.

alternatives.label: Pre-docking engine
alternatives.tooltip: Optional docking pass to generate a starting bound pose; DiffDock is ML-based.

esm2.label: ESM-2 variant
esm2.tooltip: Model size; 650M is the production default, 3B/15B for high-stakes runs.

esm2.label: Layer extraction
esm2.tooltip: Which transformer layer(s) to pool; last_4_mean often beats just-last on downstream tasks.

esm2.label: Pooling
esm2.tooltip: How to collapse the per-token tensor into a protein vector; per_residue keeps the full LxD matrix.

esm2.label: Max tokens per batch
esm2.tooltip: Token budget per microbatch to bound GPU memory.

esm2.label: Gradient checkpointing
esm2.tooltip: Trades compute for memory when fine-tuning ESM-2.

esm3_saprot.label: Use structure tokens
esm3_saprot.tooltip: Enable SaProt/ESM-3 structure-aware tokens (requires Foldseek 3Di tokens).

esm3_saprot.label: SaProt variant
esm3_saprot.tooltip: Pretrained checkpoint; AF2 variants generalize better, PDB is more crystal-structure faithful.

molecule_lm.label: Molecule encoder
molecule_lm.tooltip: Pretrained SMILES/graph encoder; MolFormer-XL is the strong default.

molecule_lm.label: Pooling
molecule_lm.tooltip: Token-pooling strategy for the molecule encoder.

gnn.label: Node granularity
gnn.tooltip: Whether graph nodes represent atoms, residues, or BRICS fragments.

gnn.label: Edge cutoff (Å)
gnn.tooltip: Distance threshold for spatial edges in the protein/ligand graph.

gnn.label: k-NN edges
gnn.tooltip: Number of nearest neighbors per node (alternative to radius cutoff).

gnn.label: Gaussian RBF bins
gnn.tooltip: Number of radial basis functions used to encode interatomic distances.

gnn.label: Line graph (edge features)
gnn.tooltip: Adds an edge-graph layer that messages over bond pairs; better for angles, slower.

handcrafted.label: ECFP radius
handcrafted.tooltip: Morgan fingerprint radius; 2 is ECFP4, 3 is ECFP6.

handcrafted.label: Mordred descriptors
handcrafted.tooltip: Include ~1800 Mordred 2D/3D descriptors; high-dim, useful for tabular baselines.

three_d.label: Voxel grid (Å)
three_d.tooltip: Voxel edge length for 3D-CNN pocket featurizers.

three_d.label: Voxel box size (Å)
three_d.tooltip: Cubic side length of the voxel grid centered on the pocket.

three_d.label: Contact map cutoff (Å)
three_d.tooltip: Distance below which a residue pair counts as a contact.

three_d.label: SE(3)-invariant features
three_d.tooltip: Use rotation/translation-invariant geometric features (distances, angles, dihedrals).

cross_modal.label: Pairwise distance bins
cross_modal.tooltip: Number of bins for discretizing residue-atom distances in the interaction tensor.

cross_modal.label: Contact-pair features
cross_modal.tooltip: Include per-residue per-atom contact features in the cross-attention input.

head.label: Head architecture
head.tooltip: Top-of-stack module that fuses protein and ligand embeddings.

head.label: Cross-attn heads
head.tooltip: Number of attention heads in the fusion module.

head.label: Cross-attn hidden dim
head.tooltip: Hidden dimensionality of the fusion module.

head.label: Bilinear rank
head.tooltip: Low-rank factorization rank for bilinear pooling.

loss.label: Regression loss
loss.tooltip: Loss for pKd/pKi/IC50 regression; Huber is robust to assay outliers.

loss.label: Huber delta
loss.tooltip: Transition point between L2 and L1 in Huber loss (in log-affinity units).

loss.label: Active/inactive head
loss.tooltip: Adds a BCE head for binary activity (cutoff configurable).

loss.label: Pairwise ranking loss
loss.tooltip: Adds a margin-ranking term so within-target ordering is preserved.

loss.label: Focal loss gamma
loss.tooltip: Focal-loss focusing parameter for the classification head; 0 disables.

loss.label: Multi-task weights
loss.tooltip: Per-task loss weights; supports learned uncertainty weighting if set to 'auto'.

regularization.label: Dropout
regularization.tooltip: Dropout probability in fusion and head layers.

regularization.label: Stochastic depth
regularization.tooltip: Per-layer drop probability for deep transformer heads.

regularization.label: Mixup alpha
regularization.tooltip: Beta-distribution alpha for input mixup; 0 disables.

regularization.label: Manifold mixup
regularization.tooltip: Mix embeddings at a random intermediate layer instead of inputs.

stability.label: Gradient clip (norm)
stability.tooltip: Max global gradient L2 norm; 0 disables.

stability.label: Gradient accumulation
stability.tooltip: Microbatches accumulated before each optimizer step.

stability.label: Mixed precision
stability.tooltip: Training precision; bf16 is the default on Ampere+ (RTX 30/40/50, A100, H100).

stability.label: EMA decay
stability.tooltip: Exponential moving average of weights; 0 disables.

stability.label: Stochastic weight averaging
stability.tooltip: Average weights over the last fraction of training for better generalization.

stability.label: Lookahead optimizer wrapper
stability.tooltip: Wraps the inner optimizer with k-step lookahead.

scheduler_optimizer.label: Optimizer
scheduler_optimizer.tooltip: Optimizer family; AdamW is the safe default, Lion is more memory-efficient.

scheduler_optimizer.label: Adam epsilon
scheduler_optimizer.tooltip: Numerical stability constant in the optimizer.

scheduler_optimizer.label: Warmup steps
scheduler_optimizer.tooltip: Linear warmup length before the main schedule.

scheduler_optimizer.label: Min LR ratio
scheduler_optimizer.tooltip: Floor for the LR schedule, as a fraction of peak LR.

distributed.label: Distributed strategy
distributed.tooltip: Multi-GPU parallelism strategy; FSDP/ZeRO-3 are needed for very large encoders.

distributed.label: Activation offload
distributed.tooltip: Offload activations to CPU to fit larger models.

distributed.label: CPU parameter offload
distributed.tooltip: ZeRO-3/FSDP CPU offload; slower but enables much larger models.

reproducibility_compile.label: Seeds
reproducibility_compile.tooltip: Random seeds; multiple seeds spawn an ensemble.

reproducibility_compile.label: Deterministic ops
reproducibility_compile.tooltip: Force deterministic CUDA kernels; slower but bit-reproducible.

reproducibility_compile.label: cuDNN benchmark
reproducibility_compile.tooltip: Let cuDNN pick fastest kernels per input shape; off for reproducibility.

reproducibility_compile.label: torch.compile mode
reproducibility_compile.tooltip: PyTorch 2 graph compilation level; max-autotune is fastest but compiles slowly.

training_monitoring.label: Eval cadence unit
training_monitoring.tooltip: Whether evaluation is triggered by steps, epochs, or wall-clock minutes.

training_monitoring.label: Eval every N
training_monitoring.tooltip: Frequency of validation runs (in the chosen unit).

training_monitoring.label: Early stop metric
training_monitoring.tooltip: Which validation metric drives early stopping.

training_monitoring.label: Early stop patience
training_monitoring.tooltip: Eval cycles without improvement before stopping.

training_monitoring.label: Min delta
training_monitoring.tooltip: Minimum improvement to count as progress.

training_monitoring.label: Checkpoint policy
training_monitoring.tooltip: When to save weights; best_and_last is the standard.

training_monitoring.label: Keep last k checkpoints
training_monitoring.tooltip: Rolling window of recent checkpoints to retain.

training_monitoring.label: Experiment tracker
training_monitoring.tooltip: Where to stream metrics, configs, and artifacts.

training_monitoring.label: GPU memory profiling
training_monitoring.tooltip: Enable torch.cuda memory snapshots for OOM debugging.

training_monitoring.label: NVTX ranges
training_monitoring.tooltip: Emit NVTX markers for Nsight Systems profiling.

inference.label: Ensemble strategy
inference.tooltip: How to combine multiple checkpoints/seeds at inference.

inference.label: Test-time augmentation
inference.tooltip: Average predictions over conformer/tautomer augmentations at inference.

inference.label: MC dropout passes
inference.tooltip: Stochastic forward passes with dropout enabled for uncertainty; 0 disables.

inference.label: Temperature scaling
inference.tooltip: Calibrate the classification head with a single-parameter temperature on val set.

inference.label: Conformal alpha
inference.tooltip: Miscoverage rate; alpha=0.1 yields 90% prediction intervals.

inference.label: Conformal calibration set
inference.tooltip: Where the calibration residuals come from.

inference.label: Group-conditional conformal
inference.tooltip: Stratify conformal intervals so coverage holds within each group.

inference.label: Attribution method
inference.tooltip: How to attribute predictions back to atoms/residues.

inference.label: IG steps
inference.tooltip: Number of Riemann steps for Integrated Gradients.

eval_analytics.label: Split strategy
eval_analytics.tooltip: Cold-target is the realistic setting for a new protein; cold-pair is the hardest.

eval_analytics.label: Primary metrics
eval_analytics.tooltip: Metrics surfaced in the run summary; CI/rm2 are DTA-community standards.

eval_analytics.label: Per-stratum metrics
eval_analytics.tooltip: Compute metrics within each cluster/family/scaffold group separately.

eval_analytics.label: Stratification keys
eval_analytics.tooltip: Grouping columns used for per-stratum analytics and heatmaps.

eval_analytics.label: Paired bootstrap n
eval_analytics.tooltip: Bootstrap resamples for confidence intervals on metrics.

eval_analytics.label: CI alpha
eval_analytics.tooltip: Significance level for bootstrap CIs (0.05 = 95% CI).

eval_analytics.label: Selectivity panel
eval_analytics.tooltip: Built-in off-target panel for selectivity scoring.

eval_analytics.label: Custom off-target UniProts
eval_analytics.tooltip: UniProt accessions used when selectivity panel is 'custom'.

eval_analytics.label: Follow-up assay
eval_analytics.tooltip: Wet-lab assay planned for top picks; affects throughput estimates and dynamic range.

eval_analytics.label: Expected throughput / week
eval_analytics.tooltip: How many compounds the wet lab can confirm per week; drives shortlist size.

eval_analytics.label: Blind ID scheme
eval_analytics.tooltip: How shortlist compounds are labeled when handed to wet lab to avoid bias.
